videoSnippet.title: Impossible With 38 Seconds!! || Gukesh vs Aravindh || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Gukesh D (2754) - Aravindh, Chithambaram VR. (2700)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.03.03
B27 Sicilian, Hungarian variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 g6 3.c3 d5 4.Bb5+ Bd7 5.Bxd7+ Qxd7 6.e5 Nc6 7.d4 f6 8.O-O fxe5 9.dxe5 Bg7 10.Re1 e6 11.c4 Nge7 12.Nc3 dxc4 13.Qxd7+ Kxd7 14.Rd1+ Kc8 15.Ne4 b6 16.Nd6+ Kc7 17.Ng5 Bxe5 18.Ndf7 Bd4 19.Nxe6+ Kd7 20.Nxd4 cxd4 21.Nxh8 Rxh8 22.b3 c3 23.Be3 Nf5 24.Rac1 Ke6 25.Bxd4 Nfxd4 26.Re1+ Kd5 27.Rxc3 a5 28.h4 a4 29.Rd1 axb3 30.Rxb3 Rb8 31.h5 b5 32.hxg6 hxg6 33.Rg3 Kc4 34.Rc1+ Kb4 35.Rb1+ Ka4 36.Rb2 Ne5 37.f4 Nc4 38.Rf2 Re8 39.Kh2 Ne2 40.Rgf3 Ne3 41.Rxe2 Ng4+ 42.Kg3 Rxe2 43.Kxg4 Rxg2+ 44.Kh4 b4 45.Re3 Rxa2 46.Rg3 Rf2 47.Rg4 Rf1 48.Kg5 Ka3
